skill.name: agent-tools
skill.description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok
skill.summary: Access 150+ AI models and tools through inference.sh CLI for image generation, video creation, LLMs, web search, and social media automation.
skill.author: tul-sh

security_audit.summary: All 194 detected security patterns are false positives from markdown documentation files. The skill contains only documentation with example shell commands in code blocks - no executable code. The 'Ruby/shell backtick execution', 'pipe to shell', 'external commands', and 'network' patterns are all inside markdown code fences showing example CLI usage. Environment variable references (INFSH_API_KEY) are documentation for legitimate API key configuration. The filesystem access patterns are documentation examples showing config file locations. This skill is purely educational documentation for the inference.sh CLI tool.

content.value_statement: Access FLUX, Veo, Claude, Gemini, and 150+ more AI models through a simple CLI. Generate images, videos, text, and automate tasks without managing API keys or infrastructure.
actual_capabilities: Generate images using FLUX, Gemini, Grok, and Seedream models
Create videos with Veo, Seedance, Wan, and OmniHuman
Call LLMs including Claude, Gemini, Kimi, and GLM through OpenRouter
Perform web searches using Tavily and Exa
Automate Twitter/X actions (post, like, retweet, follow)
limitations: Requires internet connection to access inference.sh cloud services
Some AI models may have usage limits or costs associated
Response times depend on third-party AI model providers

use_cases.title: Generate AI Images
use_cases.description: Create images for presentations, social media, or creative projects using state-of-the-art models like FLUX without managing GPUs or API keys

use_cases.title: Automate Social Media
use_cases.description: Schedule and post content to Twitter/X, engage with followers, and automate repetitive social media tasks

use_cases.title: Build AI Workflows
use_cases.description: Chain multiple AI operations together - search the web, generate content, create images, and publish to social platforms

prompt_templates.title: Generate an Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image of a [description] using the FLUX model
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating visual content for articles or social media

prompt_templates.title: Create a Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a video showing [scene description] using Veo video generation
prompt_templates.scenario: Producing short video clips for marketing or demos

prompt_templates.title: Web Search and Summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for the latest information about [topic] and provide a summary
prompt_templates.scenario: Researching current events or gathering information

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Step AI Workflow
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for information about [topic], generate an image based on the findings, and draft a social media post with the image
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating comprehensive content packages with research, visuals, and copy

output_examples.input: Generate an image of a cyberpunk city at night with neon lights
output_examples.output: I'll generate that image using FLUX through inference.sh. The image has been created and saved. You can view it at the generated output path.

output_examples.input: Search for recent AI breakthroughs and summarize them
output_examples.output: I found 5 recent articles about AI breakthroughs. Here's a summary: [Provides concise summary of key developments in AI research and applications]

output_examples.input: Create a video of a drone flying over mountains at sunset
output_examples.output: I'm generating the video using Google Veo 3.1. The video is being processed and will be ready shortly. I'll notify you when it's complete.

best_practices: Use specific, descriptive prompts when generating images or videos for best results
Test AI models with sample inputs first using 'infsh app sample' to understand expected input format
Filter apps by category using 'infsh app list --category' to find relevant tools quickly
Use 'infsh app get <app-name>' to view model details and parameters before running
anti_patterns: Do not use the installer script 'curl | sh' without reviewing it first - use the manual installation method for security-sensitive environments
Avoid generating excessive content without checking usage limits or costs associated with specific AI models
Do not hardcode API keys in scripts - use the INFSH_API_KEY environment variable or config file instead
Avoid running long video generation tasks synchronously - use the '--no-wait' flag and check status later

faq.question: Is this skill safe to use?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only contains documentation for the inference.sh CLI tool. All detected patterns are example commands in markdown files, not executable code.

faq.question: Do I need to install anything?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to install the inference.sh CLI. Run 'curl -fsSL https://cli.inference.sh | sh' or use the manual installation method described in the documentation.

faq.question: What AI models are available?
faq.answer: Over 150 models including FLUX, Veo, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Tavily, Exa, and many more for images, videos, text, search, and automation.

faq.question: Does this cost money?
faq.answer: Some AI models have associated costs. Check the pricing for specific apps using 'infsh app get <app-name>' before running.

faq.question: Can I use this without API keys?
faq.answer: You need to authenticate with inference.sh using 'infsh login'. After authentication, the CLI manages credentials automatically.

faq.question: What can I do with this skill?
faq.answer: Generate images and videos, call LLMs, perform web searches, automate Twitter actions, create 3D models, and chain these operations into workflows.
